description: Create an IP-protected, aggregated Life Cycle Inventory (LCI) dataset for Portland Cement. Import the USLCI database from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip and locate the 'Cement, Portland, at plant' manufacturing process. Generate a flattened 'System Process' (Aggregated LCI) named 'IP-Protected Cement LCI' from a product system linking all upstream providers. Export this new process to a JSON-LD zip file at ~/LCA_Results/protected_cement_lci.zip.
